risk_title: Political and Governance Instability Affecting Project Implementation Timeline
risk_summary: The project faces implementation delays linked to governance fragility, with a lengthy PC-1 revision process impacting progress. With only 14 months until closing, critical construction activities remain incomplete, suggesting potential governance bottlenecks in project execution.
evidence_quote: A lengthy timeline in the revision of the PC-1 has impacted project progress over the past reporting period. With 14 months left before project closing, the next six months are critical, especially for Component 2 which pertains to school upgradation.

risk_summary: The macroeconomic risk rating has escalated from Moderate at approval to High, indicating significant economic fragility affecting the project's operating environment and financial sustainability. This worsening condition poses risks to project implementation and completion.
evidence_quote: Macroeconomic [Risk Category Rating]: Approval Package - 29 Jul 2021: Moderate; Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 06 - 28 Jun 2024: High; Proposed Rating: High

risk_title: Institutional Capacity Constraints in Project Implementation
risk_summary: While institutional capacity risk has improved from Substantial to Moderate, the project still faces capacity challenges in the implementing agency (School Education and Literacy Department, Government of Sindh), evidenced by delays in PC-1 revision and slow progress on Component 2 construction activities.
evidence_quote: Institutional Capacity for Implementation and Sustainability [Risk Category Rating]: Approval Package - 29 Jul 2021: Substantial; Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 06 - 28 Jun 2024: Moderate; Proposed Rating: Moderate
